          Vehicle Description   
1998  Mercedes E430 Armored Vehicle- "Bulletproof."  Leather interior, 
beautiful car. Was used by a  corporate CEO and his family for limited travel.  Like 
new. This vehicle is perfect for your  executive protection, celebrity, limo 
service, or  those persons who desire a high level of safety or  protection 
for their family. This vehicle is  available armored for practically the price 
of a  regular vehicle at the car lot. You won't believe  how clean this vehicle 
is. No damage, no accidents  and in like-new condition. This vehicle is in  
immaculate condition and has been custom outfitted  with bulletproof glass and 
ballistic steel panels  for protection. The vehicle has steel radiator  
protection to protect against grenade or other  missiles. Buy it now will include 
free satellite  telephone. Satellite phones can be used wordwide  anywhere, even 
where regular cellular service is  not available. This vehicle is located in 
Southern  California is also for sale locally. It is  avaiilable for 
inspection with advance notice.  Serious buyers only. Pre-qualification may be  
required prior to viewing. May consider serious  offiers. Vehicle worth over $100,000 
when new.  Deposit required. Complete payment required within  7 days of 
auction close. This is a binding  contract.  
 
____________________________________
On Nov-13-07 at 00:52:46 PST,  seller added the following information:  
Vehicle has some delamination on windows as  expected with year since 
manufacture. All windows  are Pilkington Aerospace UK and are serial  numbered. 
Passenger compartment armored with  ballistic steel. Sunroof non-operational as it 
was  armored with high grade steel to stop bullets.  Leather interior. Wood 
grain trim, console. Dolby  surround sound. Interior Mercedes air filtration  
system. Nice car. you can't go wrong. Feels very  secure. Recommend inspection 
for serious buyer.  May require prequalification. Serious buyers only.  This is 
not a toy. This is the real deal.
